LCC-MS7-L2-1400P-MSSCI7-PCI-CFI-02 • MS Science Grade 7 • Anatomical Similarities and Evolutionary Relationships

The Same Bones

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the two students doing?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the boy want to start with the grandmother’s story?
3QUESTION 3: Based on their plan, how will the students probably start their podcast interview?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. What is each student trying to accomplish across their turns, and how does the girl’s description of Ms. Kahananui’s discovery shape the reason the boy gives for their podcast plan?
